comment: v0.18 conformance vector exercising v0.14 finding.supersede + v0.13 inline source/evidence/condition materialization. A second-implementation re-deriver should reproduce all content-addressed ids byte-identically AND honour: (a) the auto-injected supersedes link from new->old; (b) flags.superseded=true on the old finding; (c) the finding.superseded event with new_finding_id in its payload; (d) the materialized sources[]/evidence_atoms[]/condition_records[] arrays populated inline at apply-time.
